evals.name: draft-invoice-platform
evals.prompt: Create an SDD using an IEEE 1016-2009-inspired structure for a cloud-based invoice processing platform from this PRD summary: multi-tenant web app, REST API, OCR ingestion pipeline, role-based access, audit logs, and nightly reporting jobs. Default output paths are fine.
evals.expected_output: Creates docs/SDD.md and docs/SDD-gap-report.md with required section order, explicit Architecture Overview, explicit Viewpoint-to-View Mapping, formal Design Element definitions, concern-driven views, and prioritized remediation actions.

evals.name: review-only-gap-analysis
evals.prompt: Review the existing SDD in `evals/fixtures/review-only-input-sdd.md` for completeness and gaps. It includes core context and architecture notes but lacks explicit viewpoint-to-view mapping, formal design element definitions, and full traceability. Use review-only mode.
evals.expected_output: Produces docs/SDD-gap-report.md only, identifying missing required sections/artifacts, weak rationale, traceability gaps, and prioritized fixes.

evals.name: migration-monolith-to-microservices
evals.prompt: Update the monolith SDD in `evals/fixtures/monolith-before-migration-sdd.md` after a migration decision to event-driven microservices with service boundaries, async messaging, API gateway, and separate operational data stores. Use draft+review mode.
evals.expected_output: Updates docs/SDD.md to the new required structure with explicit architecture/views/elements formalization and writes docs/SDD-gap-report.md covering migration impact, risks, and remaining gaps.

evals.name: deployment-only-architecture-gap
evals.prompt: Review `evals/fixtures/deployment-only-sdd.md` and identify architecture coverage gaps. Focus on missing logical application architecture and weak quality-attribute scenario evidence.
evals.expected_output: Gap report calls out missing logical architecture (`4.1`), incomplete architecture evidence, and recommends adding quality-attribute scenarios.

evals.name: interface-fields-gap
evals.prompt: Review `evals/fixtures/interface-light-sdd.md` for formal interface definition quality. Ensure design element entries have explicit inputs/outputs/dependencies/public functions.
evals.expected_output: Gap report flags missing formal interface fields and asks for structured component entries with Inputs/Outputs/Dependencies/Public Functions.
